item.title: 据报道，SpaceX的星舰月球着陆器可能面临更多延迟
item.description: 根据周二发布的一份政府审计报告，SpaceX为美国宇航局（NASA）研发的星舰登月舱仍面临诸多技术挑战，其计划于2028年实现的登月任务很可能进一步推迟。【原文：SpaceX’s Starship lunar lander for NASA still faces numerous technical challenges and likely more delays ahead of a planned 2028 moon landing, according to a new government audit released Tuesday.】

item.title: 亚马逊交易推动美国高评级债券销售创历史新高
item.description: 美国企业投资级债券市场创下有史以来最大单日发行规模，亚马逊公司等企业共发行近660亿美元新债。【原文：The US corporate investment-grade bond market posted its largest day on record as companies including Amazon.com Inc. launched nearly $66 billion of new debt.】

item.title: 特朗普关税被推翻，谁能获得退税？
item.description: 关税退税的争夺战已然打响。但正如美国最高法院大法官布雷特·卡瓦诺所言，这场可能持续数年的法庭"乱局"仍在持续发酵。【原文：The scramble to get tariff refunds is on. But dissecting what could be a multi-year “mess” in the courts, as US Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh put it, is still unfolding.】

item.title: 杠杆贷款市场未竟之事
item.description: 寻找完美的短裤。【原文：Searching for the perfect short.】

item.title: 石油交易商筹集70亿美元信贷以应对战争动荡
item.description: 全球最大的大宗商品交易商正筹备数十亿美元的新信贷额度，为石油和天然气价格可能进一步飙升做准备——这种价格上涨可能引发巨额保证金追缴。【原文：The world’s biggest commodity traders are lining up billions of dollars in new credit lines as they position for further price spikes in oil and gas that could trigger giant margin calls.】

item.title: 美国上调2027年石油产量预测，因伊朗战争推高油价
item.description: 美国在近期因中东主要产油国供应中断导致油价飙升后，上调了对明年国内石油产量的预测。【原文：The US raised its forecast for domestic oil production next year after the recent surge in prices due to supply disruptions from key Middle East countries.】

item.title: 安大略省医疗保健养老金收益达7.7%，股票收益超越私募资产
item.description: 安大略省医疗保健养老金计划去年收益率达7.7%，因股票市场两位数的涨幅抵消了该基金私募市场投资组合的低迷回报。【原文：Healthcare of Ontario Pension Plan earned 7.7% last year after double-digit gains in stocks outweighed soft returns in the fund’s private markets portfolio.】

item.title: 韩国股市暴跌正吸引着沉迷杠杆ETF的交易者
item.description: 在距离首尔以南约一小时车程的华城，朴槿惠每晚熬夜至深夜，持续加码押注韩国股市的高风险投资。【原文：In Hwaseong, about an hour south of Seoul, Park Eun-hye has been staying up well past midnight to load up on risky bets on South Korean stocks.】

item.title: 赖特称美军护航船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，该帖随后被删除
item.description: 能源部长克里斯·赖特表示，美国海军护送一艘油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，他在社交媒体上发布了这一消息，但该帖子显然在几分钟后就被删除了。【原文：Energy Secretary Chris Wright said the US Navy escorted an oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, announcing the news in a social media post that was apparently deleted minutes later.】

item.title: 油价暴跌15%，各国领导人竞相缓解供应冲击
item.description: 周二油价延续跌势，跌幅超过15%，因全球领导人承诺政策干预将缓解伊朗战争对能源价格的影响。【原文：Oil prices extended declines to trade more than 15% lower on Tuesday as global leaders provided assurances that policy interventions will blunt the impact of the Iran war on energy prices.】

item.title: 美元与原油的关联性是当前外汇市场唯一关键因素
item.description: 随着中东战火蔓延，美元走势完全取决于一个因素：油价。【原文：The US dollar has been at the mercy of a single factor as war spirals in the Middle East: the price of oil.】

item.title: 亚马逊为美国国债销售吸引约1260亿美元订单
item.description: 据知情人士透露，亚马逊公司发行的美国债券吸引了约1260亿美元的峰值需求，创下企业债券发行史上最高纪录之一。【原文：Amazon.com Inc. has drawn about $126 billion of peak demand for its US bond sale, one of the largest ever for a corporate offering, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 哈雷零部件制造商以5000万美元价格出售业务单元
item.description: 破产的汽车零部件制造商第一品牌集团已同意将其剩余四家运营企业中的一家出售给污染控制系统制造商Active Dynamics集团的关联公司。【原文：Bankrupt auto parts maker First Brands Group agreed to sell one of its four remaining operating businesses to an affiliate of Active Dynamics Group, which manufactures pollution control systems.】

item.title: PayPay逆市勇闯IPO终点线
item.description: 软银集团旗下的PayPay公司正押注其在日本无现金支付市场的强势地位以及基石投资者的支持，以期使其在美国首次公开募股的计划免受当前市场动荡的影响。【原文：SoftBank-backed PayPay Corp. is betting its strong position in Japan’s cashless payments market and the support of cornerstone investors will insulate its plans for a US initial public offering from the current bout of market turbulence.】

item.title: 库珀曼门生帕乔尔德加盟EnTrust，推动私募信贷业务
item.description: 对冲基金Snowcat Capital Management创始人、亿万富翁莱昂·库珀曼的门生丽贝卡·帕乔德，已被任命为投资公司EnTrust Global的高级董事总经理。【原文：Rebecca Pacholder, founder of hedge fund Snowcat Capital Management and a protege of billionaire Leon Cooperman, has been appointed as senior managing director of investment firm EnTrust Global.】

item.title: Salesforce计划筹集高达250亿美元资金用于回购
item.description: 知情人士透露，Salesforce公司计划发行高达250亿美元的债券用于股票回购，这将是该软件公司有史以来规模最大的债券发行。【原文：Salesforce Inc. is planning to sell as much as $25 billion of debt to fund a share buyback, according to people with knowledge of the matter, in what would be the software firm’s biggest-ever note sale.】

item.title: 加纳启动加密货币试点交易，加密货币采用率逐步提升
item.description: 加纳证券监管机构已指定11家公司试点虚拟资产交易，该国正采取措施将加密货币纳入其金融体系。【原文：Ghana’s securities regulator has named 11 companies to pilot virtual asset trading as the country takes steps to adopt cryptocurrency as part of its financial system.】

item.title: 油轮船队驶向红海，沙特绕开霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 至少25艘超级油轮组成的船队正驶向沙特阿拉伯红海港口延布。由于伊朗战争导致霍尔木兹海峡航运中断，该王国正争分夺秒地将石油运往市场。【原文：A flotilla of at least 25 supertankers is heading to Saudi Arabia’s Red Sea port of Yanbu as the kingdom races to get its oil to market after the Iran war halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 比特币反弹至71,000美元，华尔街加大力度推动加密货币发展
item.description: 比特币周二回升至71,000美元上方，此前经历了震荡的一周——价格先是飙升，随后回落，又再度攀升。但混乱的价格走势掩盖了一个更平静的事实：华尔街仍在持续布局加密货币领域。【原文：Bitcoin climbed back above $71,000 on Tuesday after a choppy week of trading that saw it spike, retreat and spike again. But the messy price action is obscuring a quieter story: Wall Street keeps building around crypto regardless.】

item.title: 托克公司建立30亿美元流动性缓冲以应对价格波动
item.description: 托克集团获得了一项30亿美元的新信贷额度，以应对大宗商品市场的剧烈波动——这种波动可能使交易商面临巨额保证金追缴风险。【原文：Trafigura Group secured a new $3 billion credit facility to provide a liquidity buffer against sharp swings in commodity markets, which can leave traders exposed to huge margin calls.】

item.title: 伊拉克石油产量进一步削减，巴格达推动基尔库克油田重启
item.description: 由于伊朗战争的影响，伊拉克石油产量已降至每日120万桶。巴格达正积极推动重启北部基尔库克原油的出口，以弥补产量缺口。【原文：Iraq’s oil production has fallen to 1.2 million barrels a day because of the Iran war and Baghdad is pushing to restart export flows of its Kirkuk grade from the north of the country to help compensate.】

item.title: 尼日利亚暂停汽油进口许可证，达通集团获胜
item.description: 尼日利亚暂停发放汽油进口许可证，这对亿万富翁阿里科·丹格特而言是一场重大胜利。他掌控着非洲最大的炼油厂，并长期呼吁采取这一举措。【原文：Nigeria halted the issuance of import licenses for gasoline, a major win for billionaire Aliko Dangote, who controls Africa’s largest refinery and has long called for the move.】

item.title: 爱彼迎聘请优步资深高管富尔德纳担任全球运营主管
item.description: 爱彼迎公司任命优步科技公司资深高管格斯·富尔德纳为新任全球运营主管，此举标志着该公司业务多元化发展阶段的关键领导层任命。【原文：Airbnb Inc. has named longtime Uber Technologies Inc. executive Gus Fuldner as its new global head of operations, marking a key leadership hire at a time when the company’s business is diversifying.】

item.title: 英国天然气储备增加，因战时价格飙升吸引进口
item.description: 近日，英国向其天然气储存设施补充了部分天然气，因中东冲突引发的价格飙升吸引了进口。【原文：The UK added some natural gas into its storage sites in recent days, as a price surge triggered by the Middle East conflict attracted imports.】

item.title: 黑石、蓝猫收购美国私募股权公司Atlas少数股权
item.description: 黑石集团与蓝猫资本正联手收购美国私募股权公司阿特拉斯控股的少数股权，该公司管理的资产规模超过160亿美元。【原文：Blackstone Inc. and Blue Owl Capital Inc. are teaming up to acquire a minority stake in Atlas Holdings, a US private equity firm that manages more than $16 billion in assets.】

item.title: 亚马逊获法院禁令，阻止Perplexity的AI购物机器人
item.description: 法院本周裁定，Perplexity AI公司必须暂时停止使用其Comet网络浏览器代理程序，为亚马逊公司的在线市场购物者代为购买商品。【原文：Perplexity AI Inc. must for now stop using its Comet web browser agent to make purchases on behalf of shoppers from Amazon.com Inc.’s online marketplace, a court ruled this week.】

item.title: Meta将收购Moltbook——人工智能代理的病毒式社交网络
item.description: 全球最大的社交媒体公司正收购可能成为全球最奇特的社交网络。【原文：The world’s largest social media company is buying what may be the world’s strangest social network.】

item.title: 加拿大人的美国公路旅行降至四年最低水平
item.description: 2月份，仅有略超100万加拿大人驾车从美国返回，创下近四年来最低水平。【原文：Just over 1 million Canadians returned from the US by car in February, the lowest level in nearly four years.】

item.title: 索诺斯CEO汤姆·康拉德如何在应用程序灾难后重塑音频品牌
item.description: 汤姆·康拉德担任Sonos公司首席执行官的任期伊始，便遭遇了个人与公司双重危机。【原文：Tom Conrad’s tenure as CEO of Sonos Inc. kicked off with both personal and company crises.】

item.title: Russia Set for Oil-Revenue Surge in Coming Weeks on Iran War
item.description:
黑海原油运输中断抵消了上周油价飙升带来的收益，但这些收益终将到来

【原文：

Halt to Black Sea crude shipments offset benefits of soaring prices last week, but they’re coming

】
